career.name: UF Society of Asian Scientists & Engineers (UF SASE)
career.title: Backend Software Developer
description: Developed and maintained the organization's website using React, TypeScript, and Hono (Bun), providing service to over 200 students at the University of Florida.
Optimized RESTful services with Redis caching, reducing average response time by 40%, ensuring high performance.
Implemented rate-limiting middleware, type-safe validation schemes (with Zod and TypeScript), and comprehensive unit/integration testing to ensure reliability and maintainability
Designed and optimized relational schemas in SQLite (Turso) with Drizzle ORM.

career.name: UF Embedded Systems Lab
career.title: Undergraduate AI Researcher
description: Assisted in research for a new Quantum AI architecture that can learn and reconstruct missing features of data samples.
Engineered patch selection and masking strategies using quantum circuits with Python, PyTorch, and PennyLane.

career.name: OSC MiniHack Hackathon
career.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Recognized as 1 of 2 projects for Best Project Demo out of 53 submissions
Developed a Chrome extension in 24 hours using React and Node.js that leverages Google Gemini AI to provide writing assistance on the fly with customizable tones and styles
In charge of AI integration, frontend development, and chrome extension conversion

career.name: JukeBox
career.title: Frontend Developer
description: Build a public landing page for JukeBox, an open-source music queueing system designed for users to interact with and manage a shared music playlist
Implemented the UI using React, TypeScript, and SASS/SCSS, closely following designs from Figma
